# Orban Forest Inc.

> Digital agency delivering web design, AI automation, digital marketing, 3D animation, and AR/VR experiences for businesses in southwestern Ontario, Canada.

Orban Forest is based in Brantford, Ontario and serves businesses across Brantford, Cambridge, Paris, Kitchener, Waterloo, Hamilton, Guelph, Woodstock, Simcoe, Norfolk County, and Brant County.

## Contact

- Phone: +1 (365) 994-8961
- Email: hello@orbanforest.ca
- WhatsApp: +1 (365) 994-8961
- Location: Brantford, Ontario, Canada
- Website: https://orbanforest.ca
- Status: Currently accepting new projects

## Services

- [Web Design](https://orbanforest.ca/#service-web-design): UI/UX design, responsive websites, e-commerce, design systems
- [AI Automations](https://orbanforest.ca/#service-ai): Machine learning, LLM integration, workflow automation, chatbots
- [Web Applications](https://orbanforest.ca/#service-web-apps): React, Next.js, Node.js, full-stack development
- [Digital Marketing](https://orbanforest.ca/#service-digital-marketing): SEO, content strategy, social media, PPC
- [3D Animation](https://orbanforest.ca/#service-3d-animation): Character design, motion graphics, Blender, Maya
- [AR/VR Experiences](https://orbanforest.ca/#service-arvr): Unity, Unreal Engine, WebXR, spatial computing

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://orbanforest.ca/): Service overview, case studies, company process, and contact
- [Blog](https://orbanforest.ca/blog): Articles on web design, AI automation, digital marketing, and business growth
- [Contact Us](https://orbanforest.ca/contact-us): Project inquiry form, phone, email, WhatsApp
- [Web Design Cost Estimator](https://orbanforest.ca/web-design-cost-estimator): Free interactive tool to estimate website project costs based on 2026 Ontario market rates
- [Privacy Policy](https://orbanforest.ca/privacy-policy): Data handling practices for Sophia social media platform

## Case Studies

- [Loewen Property Works](https://orbanforest.ca/case-study-1): Website rebuild for property maintenance company. 3x increase in inquiries, top 5 Google ranking, delivered in 3 weeks. Services: web design, development, local SEO.
- [HBCU Superheroes](https://orbanforest.ca/case-study-2): 3D animated short celebrating HBCU culture. 6+ original characters, international team across 4 countries. Services: animation, character design, creative direction.
- [People of the Bible](https://orbanforest.ca/case-study-3): Animated series reimagining biblical narratives. 5+ episodes with unified visual identity. Services: animation, storytelling, art direction.

## Blog Articles

- [Google Business Profile: Why It's Costing You Customers Right Now](https://orbanforest.ca/blog/google-business-profile): Guide to GBP setup and optimization for local businesses in Brantford, Cambridge, Paris ON.
- [Your Customers Are Telling You Why They Buy](https://orbanforest.ca/blog/customers-tell-you-why-they-buy): Customer research strategy for discovering authentic marketing messages.
- [AI Automation for Small Business](https://orbanforest.ca/blog/automate-repetitive-tasks): Practical guide to automating lead response, scheduling, and invoice follow-up. Ontario small businesses spend 10-15 hours/week on repetitive tasks.
- [Your Website Isn't Broken. Your Marketing Around It Is.](https://orbanforest.ca/blog/website-marketing-not-broken): Why a new website alone won't generate leads without supporting marketing strategy.
- [A 30-Second Video Can Do What Your Brochure Never Could](https://orbanforest.ca/blog/30-second-video-beats-brochure): Business case for animation and video in B2B sales, with real manufacturing example.
- [Your Website Has Three Seconds](https://orbanforest.ca/blog/website-three-seconds): Web design self-audit checklist focused on first impressions and trust signals.
- [The Follow-Up Is Where the Money Is](https://orbanforest.ca/blog/follow-up-is-where-the-money-is): Guide to lead follow-up systems and automation for small businesses.

## Pricing (2026 Ontario Freelancer Rates)

- Brochure website (3-5 pages): $500 - $5,500 CAD depending on design level
- Business website (5-15 pages): $1,200 - $10,000 CAD
- E-commerce: $2,000 - $28,000 CAD
- Web application: $6,500 - $55,000 CAD
- Monthly ongoing (hosting + maintenance): $60 - $400 CAD
- Use the [Cost Estimator](https://orbanforest.ca/web-design-cost-estimator) for detailed project estimates
